creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to fgorter from comment #2)
Apparently the first error is from February 2023:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-pkg-fallout/2023-February/321754.html

The -Winvalid-utf8 warning was introduced in clang in 2022, but disabled as default. In CC x11@ maintainer of libXext.
